dependencies.relationship: Requires the Go server running with health probes for dev proxy verification

task_groups.title: Write spec tests: project initialization and dependency checks

subtasks.title: Write test: web/ directory structure and config files exist
details: Create test file (e.g., `web/tests/scaffold.test.ts` or a shell-based test script) that asserts `web/` exists at repo root, `web/package.json` and `web/tsconfig.json` are present, and no shared config files exist with the Go backend.
Assertion pseudocode: assert path_exists('web/'), assert path_exists('web/package.json'), assert path_exists('web/tsconfig.json'), assert read_json('web/package.json')['name'] is not null.
Test should be runnable with `npm test --prefix web` after dependencies are installed.

subtasks.title: Write test: package.json declares all required dependencies
details: Write a test that reads `web/package.json` and asserts vite, react, react-dom, typescript, tailwindcss, react-router-dom (or react-router), and @tanstack/react-query appear in dependencies or devDependencies.
Merge both dependency maps before asserting membership.

subtasks.title: Write test: shadcn/ui is copied into tree, not an npm dependency
details: Write a test that asserts 'shadcn-ui' and '@shadcn/ui' are absent from package.json dependencies/devDependencies.
Assert that `web/src/components/ui/` directory exists or contains at least one `.tsx` file.
This verifies the copy-into-tree model defined in the PRD.

subtasks.title: Write test: Node.js version requirement is documented or enforced
details: Write a test that checks either `web/package.json` engines.node specifies '>=18', or `docs/web-ui.md` contains 'Node 18' or '>=18'.
At least one of these conditions must be true for the test to pass.

subtasks.title: Write test: QueryClientProvider wraps the React app entry point
details: Write a test that reads `web/src/main.tsx` and asserts that 'QueryClientProvider', 'QueryClient', and '@tanstack/react-query' all appear in the source.
Assert that 'QueryClientProvider' appears before '<App' or '<RouterProvider' or '<BrowserRouter' in the file (wrapping order check).
Include a runtime render check using Vitest + React Testing Library if feasible.

checks: All spec tests for this group are written and runnable: `npm test --prefix web`
Tests fail before implementation (red state confirmed) — TS-04-1, TS-04-2, TS-04-3, TS-04-4, TS-04-5, TS-04-P5
No linter warnings introduced in test files: `npm run lint --prefix web`
Requirements 04-REQ-1.1 through 04-REQ-1.5 acceptance criteria are covered by written tests

task_groups.title: Write spec tests: Vite proxy, Makefile targets, and NPM scripts

subtasks.title: Write tests: Vite dev proxy configuration for all three endpoints
details: Write tests that read `web/vite.config.ts` and extract the proxy configuration.
Assert proxy rule for '/api' targets 'http://localhost:8080' with no path rewriting that removes the '/api' prefix.
Assert proxy rule for '/healthz' targets 'http://localhost:8080'.
Assert proxy rule for '/readyz' targets 'http://localhost:8080'.
Property test: for each of ['/api/anything', '/api/users', '/healthz', '/readyz'], confirm a matching proxy rule exists targeting port 8080.

subtasks.title: Write tests: Makefile web-dev and web-build targets
details: Write tests that read `Makefile` and extract the `web-dev` and `web-build` targets.
Assert 'npm install' appears before 'npm run dev' in `web-dev` target, gated by a `node_modules` presence check.
Assert 'npm install' appears before 'npm run build' in `web-build` target, gated by a `node_modules` presence check.
Property test: assert npm install occurs at most once (no retry loop) and always precedes the run step.

subtasks.title: Write tests: NPM scripts (dev, build, lint, preview)
details: Write tests that read `web/package.json` scripts section.
Assert 'dev' script contains 'vite' without HMR-disabling flags.
Assert 'build' script contains 'vite build'.
Assert 'lint' script contains both 'eslint' and 'tsc' with '--noEmit'.
Assert 'preview' script contains 'vite preview'.

subtasks.title: Write tests: exit code propagation for Makefile and npm scripts
details: Write static analysis tests asserting Makefile target lines do not use '- ' prefix (error suppression).
Assert no forced 'exit 0' appears after npm commands in web-dev or web-build targets.
Write a test that introduces a deliberate TypeScript error in a temp file, runs `npm run lint`, asserts non-zero exit code and file/line number in output.
Clean up the temp error file after assertion.

checks: All spec tests for this group are written and runnable: `npm test --prefix web`
Tests fail before implementation (red state confirmed) — TS-04-6 through TS-04-15, TS-04-E3, TS-04-E4, TS-04-E5, TS-04-P2, TS-04-P3
No linter warnings introduced in test files: `npm run lint --prefix web`
Requirements 04-REQ-2.x, 04-REQ-3.x, 04-REQ-4.x acceptance criteria are covered by written tests

task_groups.title: Write spec tests: Hello World route and documentation

subtasks.title: Write tests: Hello World route renders 'af-hub' at '/'
details: Write a Vitest + React Testing Library test that renders the App component at route '/'.
Assert the rendered output contains the text 'af-hub' and at least one placeholder message string.
Assert no navigation bar or sidebar elements are present in the rendered output.
Assert the router configuration defines a route with path '/' mapped to the Hello World component.
Property test: render in both dev and production modes; assert no uncaught exceptions.

subtasks.title: Write test: unknown route does not crash the React app
details: Write a Vitest + React Testing Library test that renders the App component at route '/unknown'.
Assert the rendered output is non-null and non-empty HTML.
Assert no uncaught JavaScript exceptions are thrown.
Assert React error boundary is not triggered.

subtasks.title: Write tests: docs/web-ui.md content and README.md links
details: Write a test that reads `docs/web-ui.md` and asserts it contains: 'Node' and '18', 'npm install', 'npm run dev', 'npm run build', 'web/', 'shadcn', and a phrase like 'copied' or 'npx shadcn'.
Write a test that reads `README.md` and asserts it contains a reference to 'docs/web-ui.md' (or 'web-ui'), 'make web-dev' (or 'web-dev'), and 'make web-build' (or 'web-build').

subtasks.title: Write edge case test: proxy survives backend being offline
details: Write a static config test asserting vite.config.ts proxy has a target for '/api' pointing to 'http://localhost:8080'.
Document in the test that behavioral verification (Vite returns 502 without crashing) is covered by the smoke test TS-04-SMOKE-3 and manual verification.
Assert proxy config does not set 'secure: true' in a way that would prevent error passthrough.

subtasks.title: Write edge case test: Node.js version documentation check
details: Write a static test that reads `docs/web-ui.md` and asserts Node 18+ prerequisite is documented.
Additionally check `web/package.json` engines.node field if present.
Document that the dynamic test (running npm with old Node) is a manual/CI environment concern and should be noted in docs/web-ui.md.

checks: All spec tests for this group are written and runnable: `npm test --prefix web`
Tests fail before implementation (red state confirmed) — TS-04-16, TS-04-17, TS-04-18, TS-04-19, TS-04-E1, TS-04-E2, TS-04-E6, TS-04-P4
No linter warnings introduced in test files: `npm run lint --prefix web`
Requirements 04-REQ-5.x, 04-REQ-6.x acceptance criteria are covered by written tests

task_groups.title: Initialize web/ project directory with Vite + React + TypeScript

subtasks.title: Scaffold web/ directory with Vite React-TypeScript template
details: Run `npm create vite@latest web -- --template react-ts` at the repo root (or equivalent manual setup).
Ensure `web/package.json` is created with name, version, and scripts fields.
Ensure `web/tsconfig.json` and `web/tsconfig.node.json` are present.
Confirm `web/` has its own `package.json` with no shared config with the Go backend root.

subtasks.title: Install and configure Tailwind CSS in web/
details: Run `npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer --prefix web` and `npx tailwindcss init -p` inside `web/`.
Configure `tailwind.config.js` content paths to include `web/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}`.
Add Tailwind directives (@tailwind base/components/utilities) to `web/src/index.css`.

subtasks.title: Install React Router and TanStack Query; configure providers
details: Run `npm install react-router-dom @tanstack/react-query --prefix web`.
In `web/src/main.tsx`, wrap the root render with `<QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>` and `<BrowserRouter>` (or RouterProvider).
Create a `queryClient` instance using `new QueryClient()` above the render call.
Ensure QueryClientProvider is the outermost wrapper so all components are descendants.

subtasks.title: Initialize shadcn/ui into the web/ tree
details: Run `npx shadcn-ui@latest init` inside `web/` and follow the prompts (TypeScript, Tailwind, src/ path).
Confirm that `web/src/components/ui/` directory is created with at least one copied component file.
Verify that 'shadcn-ui' and '@shadcn/ui' are NOT added to `web/package.json` dependencies.
Ensure `components.json` is present at `web/components.json` as the shadcn/ui config file.

subtasks.title: Add engines.node field and configure ESLint for the project
details: Add `"engines": { "node": ">=18" }` to `web/package.json`.
Ensure ESLint is configured (`.eslintrc.cjs` or `eslint.config.js`) with TypeScript and React rules.
Update the `lint` script in `web/package.json` to: `"lint": "tsc --noEmit && eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx"`.
Verify `npm run lint` exits 0 on a clean project.

checks: Spec tests TS-04-1, TS-04-2, TS-04-3, TS-04-4, TS-04-5 pass: `npm test --prefix web`
No linter warnings: `npm run lint --prefix web`
`web/package.json`, `web/tsconfig.json` exist at repo root `web/` subdirectory
`web/src/components/ui/` directory exists with copied shadcn/ui files
QueryClientProvider wraps the React tree in `web/src/main.tsx`
Requirements 04-REQ-1.1 through 04-REQ-1.5 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Configure Vite dev proxy and define NPM scripts

subtasks.title: Configure Vite dev proxy in vite.config.ts
details: Open `web/vite.config.ts` and add a `server.proxy` configuration block.
Add proxy rule: `'/api': { target: 'http://localhost:8080', changeOrigin: true }` — do NOT rewrite the path to drop '/api'.
Add proxy rule: `'/healthz': { target: 'http://localhost:8080', changeOrigin: true }`.
Add proxy rule: `'/readyz': { target: 'http://localhost:8080', changeOrigin: true }`.
Confirm port 8080 matches the Go backend's default configuration from spec 01.

subtasks.title: Define and verify all four NPM scripts in package.json
details: Ensure `web/package.json` scripts section contains exactly these entries:
`"dev": "vite"` — starts the Vite dev server with HMR enabled.
`"build": "tsc && vite build"` — type-checks then bundles to `web/dist/`.
`"lint": "tsc --noEmit && eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx"` — runs type check and ESLint.
`"preview": "vite preview"` — serves the built assets from `web/dist/`.
Run `npm run lint --prefix web` on a clean codebase and confirm exit code 0.

checks: Spec tests TS-04-6, TS-04-7, TS-04-8, TS-04-9, TS-04-12, TS-04-13, TS-04-14, TS-04-15, TS-04-P1 pass: `npm test --prefix web`
No linter warnings: `npm run lint --prefix web`
`web/vite.config.ts` contains proxy rules for '/api', '/healthz', '/readyz' all targeting port 8080
All four npm scripts (dev, build, lint, preview) present in `web/package.json`
Requirements 04-REQ-2.1 through 04-REQ-2.4 and 04-REQ-4.1 through 04-REQ-4.4 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Add Makefile targets: web-dev and web-build

subtasks.title: Implement make web-dev target with conditional npm install
details: Add the following target to the project Makefile at the repo root:
`web-dev:`
`	@if [ ! -d web/node_modules ]; then npm install --prefix web; fi`
`	npm run dev --prefix web`
Ensure no '- ' prefix on any command line (exit codes must propagate).
Test manually: delete `web/node_modules/`, run `make web-dev`, confirm npm install runs first.

subtasks.title: Implement make web-build target with conditional npm install
details: Add the following target to the project Makefile at the repo root:
`web-build:`
`	@if [ ! -d web/node_modules ]; then npm install --prefix web; fi`
`	npm run build --prefix web`
Ensure no '- ' prefix on any command line so non-zero exit codes are propagated to make.
Verify that a failed npm install aborts the target without proceeding to `npm run build`.
Verify that a failed `npm run build` propagates non-zero exit code to CI.

checks: Spec tests TS-04-10, TS-04-11, TS-04-E3, TS-04-E4, TS-04-P2, TS-04-P3 pass: `npm test --prefix web`
No linter warnings: `npm run lint --prefix web`
`make web-build` completes successfully with exit code 0 on a clean repo: `make web-build`
Makefile targets do not suppress exit codes (no '- ' prefix on npm lines)
Requirements 04-REQ-3.1, 04-REQ-3.2, 04-REQ-3.E1, 04-REQ-3.E2 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Implement the Hello World route at '/'

subtasks.title: Create the Hello World page component
details: Create `web/src/pages/HomePage.tsx` (or equivalent) with a minimal React component.
Component must render the text 'af-hub' visibly and a brief placeholder message (e.g., 'Welcome — more coming soon').
No navigation bar, sidebar, or complex layout components.
Keep the component under 30 lines of TSX.

subtasks.title: Configure React Router with the single '/' route
details: In `web/src/main.tsx` (or a dedicated `web/src/router.tsx`), configure React Router with a single route: `{ path: '/', element: <HomePage /> }`.
Add a catch-all route or fallback (e.g., path='*') that renders a minimal not-found message without crashing.
Wrap the router in the existing QueryClientProvider so the provider order is preserved.
Use BrowserRouter or createBrowserRouter as appropriate for the React Router version installed.

checks: Spec tests TS-04-16, TS-04-17, TS-04-E6, TS-04-P4 pass: `npm test --prefix web`
No linter warnings: `npm run lint --prefix web`
`npm run build --prefix web` succeeds with exit code 0 and produces `web/dist/index.html`
Manual browser check: navigating to '/' shows 'af-hub' text; navigating to '/unknown' shows a non-blank page without JS errors
Requirements 04-REQ-5.1, 04-REQ-5.2, 04-REQ-5.E1 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Write frontend documentation and update README

subtasks.title: Create docs/web-ui.md with full frontend development guide
details: Create `docs/web-ui.md` with the following sections:
## Prerequisites — Node.js 18+ requirement; explain what happens if older Node is used.
## Setup — `npm install` inside `web/`.
## Dev server — `npm run dev`, mention the Vite HMR URL.
## Production build — `npm run build`, output in `web/dist/`.
## Project structure — describe `web/src/`, `web/src/components/ui/`, `web/src/pages/`, etc.
## Component conventions — explain shadcn/ui copy-into-tree model, how to add new components via `npx shadcn-ui@latest add <component>`.
Include 'Node 18' or '>=18' explicitly in the Prerequisites section.

subtasks.title: Update README.md to link to docs/web-ui.md and mention make targets
details: Open `README.md` at the repo root and add a section or bullet for the frontend.
Include a link to `docs/web-ui.md` (e.g., `[Frontend Guide](docs/web-ui.md)`).
Mention `make web-dev` to start the frontend dev server.
Mention `make web-build` to run the production frontend build.
Keep the addition concise — a short paragraph or bullet list is sufficient.

checks: Spec tests TS-04-18, TS-04-19, TS-04-E1 pass: `npm test --prefix web`
No linter warnings: `npm run lint --prefix web`
`docs/web-ui.md` exists and contains Node 18+, npm install, npm run dev, npm run build, web/ structure, and shadcn/ui conventions
`README.md` links to `docs/web-ui.md` and mentions `make web-dev` and `make web-build`
Requirements 04-REQ-6.1, 04-REQ-6.2 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Integration checkpoint: full project builds and lints cleanly

subtasks.title: Run full npm test suite and confirm all spec tests pass
details: Run `npm test --prefix web` and confirm all tests pass with exit code 0.
Run `npm run lint --prefix web` and confirm exit code 0 with no warnings.
Run `npm run build --prefix web` and confirm `web/dist/index.html` is produced.

subtasks.title: Run all remaining spec tests (routes, docs, edge cases, property tests)
details: Run the full test suite: `npm test --prefix web -- --reporter=verbose`.
Confirm TS-04-16 through TS-04-19 and all edge case and property tests pass.
Confirm no TypeScript compilation errors remain: `tsc --noEmit` inside `web/`.

subtasks.title: Verify make targets function end-to-end from repo root
details: Delete `web/node_modules/` if present, then run `make web-build` and confirm it auto-installs and builds successfully.
Confirm `web/dist/index.html` exists after `make web-build`.
Optionally start `make web-dev` briefly and confirm the Vite URL is printed to stdout.

checks: All spec tests pass: `npm test --prefix web -- --reporter=verbose`
Zero lint errors: `npm run lint --prefix web`
`make web-build` exits 0 and produces `web/dist/index.html`: `make web-build`
TypeScript reports no errors: run `cd web && tsc --noEmit`
All requirements 04-REQ-1.x through 04-REQ-6.x acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Wiring verification: end-to-end integration and smoke tests

subtasks.title: Trace PATH-1: make web-dev → npm install → Vite dev server → Hello World page
details: Execute the full PATH-1 chain: run `make web-dev` from repo root with `web/node_modules/` absent.
Confirm npm install runs and populates `web/node_modules/`.
Confirm Vite dev server starts and prints a URL (e.g., http://localhost:5173) to stdout.
Issue an HTTP GET to the printed URL and assert HTTP 200 response.
Assert the response body contains the text 'af-hub'.
Confirm no JavaScript console errors on initial page load.
All real components used: Makefile web-dev target, web/package.json, web/vite.config.ts, web/src/main.tsx, Hello World route component.

subtasks.title: Trace PATH-2: make web-build → npm install → Vite build → web/dist/ assets
details: Execute PATH-2: run `make web-build` from repo root with `web/node_modules/` absent.
Confirm npm install runs first, then `npm run build` executes.
Confirm `web/dist/` is created and contains `index.html` and bundled JS/CSS assets.
Confirm make exits with code 0.
No stub or TODO markers should remain in `web/src/` files.

subtasks.title: Trace PATH-3: Vite proxy forwards /api/* to Go backend; verify return value propagation
details: With both the Vite dev server and Go backend (spec 01) running, issue a GET to `http://localhost:5173/api/` or `http://localhost:5173/healthz`.
Confirm the response matches what the Go backend returns (status code and body).
Confirm no CORS errors appear in the browser network tab.
Confirm the Vite dev server does not crash after forwarding the request.
Verify return value propagation: the browser receives the exact HTTP response body and status from the Go backend.

subtasks.title: Stub and dead-code audit across all web/ source files
details: Search `web/src/` for any stub markers: `throw new Error('not implemented')`, `// TODO`, `// FIXME`, `console.log` left in production code.
Confirm no placeholder components that were meant to be replaced still exist.
Confirm `web/src/pages/HomePage.tsx` renders real 'af-hub' text and is not a stub.
Confirm `web/src/main.tsx` has a real QueryClientProvider and router setup, not a placeholder.
Command: `grep -r 'not implemented\|TODO\|FIXME' web/src/ || echo 'clean'`

subtasks.title: Cross-spec entry point verification: Go backend health endpoints accessible via proxy
details: Confirm that the proxy rules in `vite.config.ts` reference the Go backend spec-01 endpoints `/healthz` and `/readyz` exactly as defined in spec 01.
With the Go backend running, confirm `curl http://localhost:5173/healthz` returns the same response as `curl http://localhost:8080/healthz`.
Confirm `curl http://localhost:5173/readyz` returns the same response as `curl http://localhost:8080/readyz`.
This verifies the cross-spec wiring between spec 04 proxy config and spec 01 backend health endpoints.

checks: Smoke test TS-04-SMOKE-1 passes: make web-dev starts the server, http://localhost:5173 returns 200 with 'af-hub'
Smoke test TS-04-SMOKE-2 passes: make web-build exits 0, web/dist/index.html exists
Smoke test TS-04-SMOKE-3 passes: Vite proxy correctly forwards /healthz to Go backend with no CORS errors
Zero stub markers in web/src/: `grep -r 'not implemented\|TODO\|FIXME' web/src/ || echo clean`
All spec tests pass: `npm test --prefix web -- --reporter=verbose`
No linter errors: `npm run lint --prefix web`
Cross-spec: Go backend health endpoints reachable through Vite proxy at port 5173
PATH-1, PATH-2, PATH-3 execution paths fully traced with no stubs remaining
